# Web Development Lab - Copilot Instructions

## Project Context
This is a 5th Semester Web Development Lab project repository containing lab tasks, practice work, assignments, and final project.

## Development Guidelines
- Use VS Code for development and GitHub for version control
- Each lab task is organized in separate folders (Lab-01, Lab-02, etc.)
- Code should be simple, beginner-friendly, and well-structured
- Follow HTML best practices and clean indentation
- Do not add extra features unless explicitly asked
- Keep earlier lab work unchanged unless asked to refactor

## Current Lab Requirements
**Lab 01**: Plain CV using only HTML (no CSS, no JavaScript)
- Use semantic HTML tags only
- Include: Name, Contact Information, Objective, Education, Skills, Experience, Hobbies/Interests

## Future Labs
This repository will evolve with each lab, gradually adding CSS, JavaScript, forms, layouts, responsiveness, and a final project.
